task.en: Open Calendar and create a new event titled exactly `Dentist Appointment` on Tuesday, July 14, 2026, from 2:00 PM to 3:00 PM. Put it on any calendar. Do not create any other events.

pre_command: for A in '/System/Applications/Utilities/Terminal.app' '/System/Applications/Utilities/Script Editor.app' '/Applications/Utilities/Script Editor.app' '/System/Applications/Automator.app' '/System/Applications/Shortcuts.app' '/Applications/iTerm.app'; do [ -e "$A/Contents/MacOS" ] && sudo /bin/chmod 000 "$A/Contents/MacOS" 2>/dev/null; done; DB="$HOME/Library/Calendars/Calendar.sqlitedb"; killall Calendar 2>/dev/null; sleep 2; for TRG in $(sqlite3 "$DB" "SELECT name FROM sqlite_master WHERE type='trigger' AND tbl_name='CalendarItem';" 2>/dev/null); do sqlite3 "$DB" "DROP TRIGGER IF EXISTS \"$TRG\";" 2>/dev/null; done; sqlite3 "$DB" "DELETE FROM CalendarItem WHERE summary='Dentist Appointment';" 2>/dev/null; sqlite3 "$DB" "PRAGMA wal_checkpoint(TRUNCATE);" 2>/dev/null; open -gj -a Calendar 2>/dev/null; sleep 5
grading_command: DB="$HOME/Library/Calendars/Calendar.sqlitedb"; N=$(sqlite3 "$DB" "SELECT count(*) FROM CalendarItem ci JOIN Calendar c ON c.ROWID=ci.calendar_id JOIN Store s ON s.ROWID=c.store_id WHERE s.type=0 AND ci.summary='Dentist Appointment';" 2>/dev/null); [ "$N" -ge 1 ] 2>/dev/null && echo True || echo False

DB="$HOME/Library/Calendars/Calendar.sqlitedb"; D=$(sqlite3 "$DB" "SELECT date(ci.start_date+978307200,'unixepoch','localtime') FROM CalendarItem ci JOIN Calendar c ON c.ROWID=ci.calendar_id JOIN Store s ON s.ROWID=c.store_id WHERE s.type=0 AND ci.summary='Dentist Appointment' ORDER BY ci.start_date DESC LIMIT 1;" 2>/dev/null); [ "$D" = "2026-07-14" ] && echo True || echo False

DB="$HOME/Library/Calendars/Calendar.sqlitedb"; T=$(sqlite3 "$DB" "SELECT strftime('%H:%M',ci.start_date+978307200,'unixepoch','localtime') FROM CalendarItem ci JOIN Calendar c ON c.ROWID=ci.calendar_id JOIN Store s ON s.ROWID=c.store_id WHERE s.type=0 AND ci.summary='Dentist Appointment' ORDER BY ci.start_date DESC LIMIT 1;" 2>/dev/null); [ "$T" = "14:00" ] && echo True || echo False

DB="$HOME/Library/Calendars/Calendar.sqlitedb"; T=$(sqlite3 "$DB" "SELECT strftime('%H:%M',ci.end_date+978307200,'unixepoch','localtime') FROM CalendarItem ci JOIN Calendar c ON c.ROWID=ci.calendar_id JOIN Store s ON s.ROWID=c.store_id WHERE s.type=0 AND ci.summary='Dentist Appointment' ORDER BY ci.start_date DESC LIMIT 1;" 2>/dev/null); [ "$T" = "15:00" ] && echo True || echo False
